General Employment Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

  3. Village of Hastings-on-Hudson General Employment Application


    Complete the below to apply for an open position with the Village.

    Once your application is received, the appropriate department may be in touch.

  5. Personal Information

  22. Employment Desired and Related Questions

  24. Select the department you wish to be employed with.

  25. List the position you are applying for.

  27. Are you currently employed?*
  28. If you are employed, may we contact your current employer?*
  30. Have you previously applied to work for the Village?*
  33. Have you previously worked for the Village?*

  38. Education

  40. Are you currently a high school student?*
  41. Do you have any educational experience beyond high school?*
  42. Are you currently a college/trade student?*
  43. Are you currently a graduate/doctoral student?*

  45. List Name and Location of High School, as well as number of years attended and if you graduated.

  47. List name and location of the college or trade school you attended, your major/area of focus, and the number of years attended and if you graduated.

  49. List the name and location of your graduate and/or doctoral proram, your program and focus, and if you graduated.

  53. Former Employers

  54. List your previous two employers, if applicable. Begin with the most current.

  61. Briefly describe your duties and responsibilities.

  68. May we contact your supervisor?

  77. Briefly describe your duties and responsibilities.

  84. May we contact your supervisor?

  88. References

  89. Provide below three references. References should be a combination of character and professional references, as appropriate.

  91. Provide the name, contact information, how you are affiliated with the person, and number of years known.

  93. Provide the name, contact information, how you are affiliated with the person, and number of years known.

  95. Provide the name, contact information, how you are affiliated with the person, and number of years known.

  99. Skills & Training

  100. List below any special skills, training, or certifications you possess that would be useful to the position you're applying for.

  106. Include your resume/cv

  110. Affirmation and Authorization for Release of Personal Information

  112. This affirmation and authorization for release of personal  information MUST be  completed:  By hitting SUBMIT below, I hereby authorize the Village of Hastings-on-Hudson and its respective Departments to request verbal records or written verification of any or all information contained herein in regard to my previous employment or education. I further authorize a review and full disclosure of all employment and education records concerning me whether said records are of a public, private or confidential nature. The intent of this authorization is to give my consent for full and complete disclosure of records.  I further hold harmless the Village of Hastings-on-Hudson, and its respective Departments and their respective officers and/or employees from any all liability which may be incurred as a result of collecting such information.  Further, my signature below certifies that I have read and fully understand the "Affirmation and Authorization for Release of Personal Information," and have acknowledged that a photocopy of the front page of my employment application containing this release will be valid as an original thereof, even though said photocopy does not contain an original writing of my signature. I affirm that all statements made on this application (including any attached paper) are true under the penalties of perjury.

    113. Leave This Blank:

  114. This field is not part of the form submission.

  115. Submit

About Us

  1. Hastings-on-Hudson is a 2 square mile village in Westchester County, New York, United States. Located in an area of hills on the Hudson River opposite the Palisades cliffs, north of the city of Yonkers. It is located in the southwest part of the town of Greenburgh. The Village is bordered by the Hudson River to the west, and the Saw Mill River to the east. As of the 2020 census, the Village has a population of 8,590. Located along U.S. Route 9, "Broadway", Hastings is a suburb of New York City.

Government Websites by CivicPlus®
